selection_contract.included_node_rule: Materialize only the explicit QIT owner structures enumerated in this builder: engine types, macro-stages, fixed operators, torus identities, Weyl branches, proven axes, negative witnesses, and 64 subcycle steps. Do not infer runtime state, history/evidence, or sidecar payloads.
selection_contract.edge_rule: Materialize only the explicitly constructed edges in this builder: structural topology edges between emitted owner nodes plus bounded NEGATIVE_PROVES witness edges. Do not infer extra relations from simulations, sidecars, or documentation.
selection_contract.validation_gate: Each emitted node must pass its owner-schema Pydantic model before the graph is materialized. Validation failures fail the build rather than emitting partial owner truth.
selection_contract.bridge_policy: public_id/public_id_index are stable join handles only. Cross-layer integration requires explicit bridge admission outside this owner builder.

description: Owner graph encoding of the Geometric Engine's structural topology plus bounded negative-witness nodes/edges: 8 macro-stages × 2 engine types, 4 fixed subcycle operators, 64 subcycle steps (16×4 runtime grain), 3 nested Hopf tori, 2 Weyl branches, 7 proven axes, and 9 negative witnesses. All nodes carry stable public_id for cross-layer joining.

a75ac4befa5e56b2.label: type1
a75ac4befa5e56b2.description: Type-1: Left Weyl spinor, H_L = +n·σ, Bloch law ṙ_L = +2n×r_L

01df452782c169e2.label: type2
01df452782c169e2.description: Type-2: Right Weyl spinor, H_R = −n·σ, Bloch law ṙ_R = −2n×r_R

e4540b8ff8445ba1.label: left
e4540b8ff8445ba1.description: Left Weyl spinor branch carried by the Type-1 engine family.

e7c59b9f74128ec7.label: right
e7c59b9f74128ec7.description: Right Weyl spinor branch carried by the Type-2 engine family.

1504af1f377932d9.label: axis_0
1504af1f377932d9.description: Polarity: base state moderator — admissible/non-admissible subsets (gradient_up / gradient_down)

d5f161a324a94f20.label: axis_1
d5f161a324a94f20.description: Topology4 boundary openness: open system (CPTP/Lindblad families) vs closed system (unitary families)

2cee085667f098e2.label: axis_2
2cee085667f098e2.description: Topology4 radial accessibility: expand (larger equivalence classes) vs compress (smaller equivalence classes)

7905294e7f427080.label: axis_3
7905294e7f427080.description: Engine-family split: Type-1 (inward, Left Weyl H_L=+n·σ) vs Type-2 (outward, Right Weyl H_R=−n·σ). Physical chirality overlays noncanon — see AXIS3_HYPOTHESES.md

f3b9b9d197c66e28.label: axis_4
f3b9b9d197c66e28.description: Thermodynamic path: Deductive (FeTi — S→0, sequence constraint) vs Inductive (TeFi — ΔW→max, sequence drive)

52f4e85e1b321b25.label: axis_5
52f4e85e1b321b25.description: Generator algebra: Line/TeTi (differentiation, Gradient+DiracDelta, discrete boundary) vs Wave/FeFi (integration, Laplacian+Fourier, continuous field)

dd53789b2e1978a4.label: axis_6
dd53789b2e1978a4.description: Precedence / composition sidedness: UP vs DOWN (left-action Aρ vs right-action ρA)

ec7e5d0fffedff62.label: neg_no_torus_transport
ec7e5d0fffedff62.description: Removing torus transport kills the engine

9b1c490d0bf89816.label: neg_no_chirality
9b1c490d0bf89816.description: Removing engine type distinction kills asymmetry

dc48a34a8312f716.label: neg_axis6_shared
dc48a34a8312f716.description: Sharing Axis 6 polarity across types kills separation

a40e26b21e02fe7e.label: neg_missing_fe
a40e26b21e02fe7e.description: Removing Fe operator kills the subcycle

b7d42cb39def8b33.label: neg_missing_operator
b7d42cb39def8b33.description: Removing any single operator kills the subcycle

447fa9ed3f9486ba.label: neg_native_only
447fa9ed3f9486ba.description: Using only native operators kills type distinction

6d64f684ea4c42ac.label: neg_type_flatten
6d64f684ea4c42ac.description: Flattening engine types kills chirality separation
